prose: **Fukui reactivity indices for furan** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RIJK density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single point on the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` coordinates (no relaxation at DFT). Mulliken‐based Fukui indices (neutral vs. N±1 states) were computed: f+ = [−1.3316182, 1.2286866, 1.2270264, 1.9233053, 1.9242931, –1.2190639, –1.2191056, –0.76678308, –0.76674059], f- = [0.08382155, 0.089103093, 0.089304821, 0.161527, 0.1616371, 0.10248412, 0.1025135, 0.10481615, 0.10479266], f0 = [−0.62389834, 0.65889484, 0.65816562, 1.0424161, 1.0429651, –0.55828991, –0.55829603, –0.33098346, –0.33097396], dual descriptor = [−1.4154398, 1.1395835, 1.1377216, 1.7617783, 1.762656, –1.3215481, –1.321619, –0.87159923, –0.87153325]. The most electrophilic site is C-5 (1-based) with f+ = 1.9242931; the most nucleophilic site is C-5 with f- = 0.1616371. SCF converged; no warnings reported. Command: `cli.py fukui --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out <path>.json`. integrity.trustworthy: true.
